item.title: Obama endorses Virginia redistricting constitutional amendment that could help Dems gain 4 seats
item.description: Former President Barack Obama backed a Virginia redistricting plan that could add four Democratic House seats as redistricting battles intensify.

item.title: Tom Emmer calls for Tim Walz, Keith Ellison to 'serve jail time' if fraud coverup allegations are true
item.description: Rep. Tom Emmer calls for a deeper probe into Gov. Tim Walz and AG Keith Ellison, alleging they may have delayed fraud accountability to protect their ...

item.title: Republican Rep Burgess Owens to retire from Congress when term ends
item.description: Rep. Burgess Owens, R-Utah, announces he won't seek re-election in 2026. The former NFL player and President Donald Trump supporter will complete his ...

item.title: Man accused of plotting Trump assassination claims Iran forced him to
item.description: A Pakistani businessman accused of plotting to assassinate President Donald Trump testified that he was coerced by Iran and feared for his family's sa...

item.title: WATCH: Navy SEAL-turned-senator tackles 'unhinged' protester during chaotic hearing
item.description: Former Navy SEAL Sen. Tim Sheehy intervened during a Senate hearing as Capitol Police struggled to remove an anti-war protester from the room.
